title: fix(playground): route-level code splitting with Suspense fallback
summary: Converts ~45 static page imports in the playground App.tsx to React.lazy() with a Suspense boundary inside the layout shell. Also lazy-loads prettier in formatting.ts with a memoized singleton pattern. Auth pages (Login, SignUp) remain eagerly loaded. Adds a PageLoader spinner component as the Suspense fallback. Claims a 712KB (12%) reduction in main bundle size.
maintainerNotes: Approved by mfrachet, but has merge conflicts that need rebasing — likely from PR #13938 (agent playground) which merged shortly before this was opened. CI failures in Core, E2E, and Memory tests appear unrelated (playground-only changes). No new tests, but this is a straightforward code-splitting refactor with no behavioral changes. The prettier lazy-loading pattern with error recovery is well-implemented. Once conflicts are resolved, this should be ready to merge.
